subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath in His grace accepted the remembrance of His servants and commanded them to glorify His Self, that He may lift them unto heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی قبل ذکر عباده فضلا من عنده و امرهم بثناء نفسه لیرفعهم الی
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
